name: Phase 7 KPI engine and control signals requirements matrix

rows.requirement: KPI definitions, formulas, thresholds, and versioning
evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts defines tenant-owned versioned KpiDefinition, KpiFormulaDefinition, and KpiThresholdRuleSet primitives
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves KPI/formula/threshold ids, version fields, active status, and source binding contract
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves invalid runtime entity/cadence-style inputs are rejected before API wiring can pass unsafe JSON into the domain model
E2E-060 proves KPI definition/threshold publication through the Admin UI and API readback.
E2E-063 proves a changed threshold affects a future evaluation without corrupting the historical seeded evaluation trace.
E2E-064 proves read-only and cross-tenant users cannot mutate KPI definitions through UI or direct API paths.

rows.cleanup: Definitions, formulas, thresholds, and historical evaluations are deterministic in-memory test state; E2E-060/E2E-063/E2E-064 call /test-fixtures/reset and verify draft/action cleanup or preserved seeded history by readback.

e2e_evidence.notes: Admin UI preview/create/publish flow proves threshold config, API readback, audit, reload persistence, and reset cleanup.
Admin UI threshold change plus API future evaluation prove new threshold outcome while historical evaluation trace remains unchanged.
Read-only UI, direct API checks, and Tenant B list readbacks prove backend mutation denial and cross-tenant no-leak behavior.

evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts implements a constrained tokenizer/parser/evaluator for arithmetic, parentheses, numeric bindings, and whitelisted math functions only

packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves deterministic formula trace and rejects unsafe global/property syntax, unknown bindings, missing values, tenant mismatch, and non-finite division results
E2E-060 and E2E-063 prove the constrained formula preview/evaluation path from browser through API without mutating state during preview.
E2E-061 and E2E-062 prove formula trace result:-25 is visible and reproducible in KPI deviation readback.

e2e_evidence.notes: Admin UI preview/create/publish flow proves threshold config, API readback, audit, reload persistence, and reset cleanup.
Deviation UI and API readback prove deterministic critical and warning control signals plus governed evaluation command audit.

rows.requirement: KPI source bindings and evaluation periods
evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts evaluates KPI values from canonical source values with bindingKey/sourceEntity/sourceField/observedAt trace and evaluation period validation
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves source trace, formula trace, threshold trace, entity/period output, and cross-tenant rejection before evaluation proceeds
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves invalid calendar dates, empty sourceEntityId, and malformed source observedAt are rejected before trace creation
E2E-061 proves seeded project source data creates a reproducible KPI signal for project-alpha-a.
E2E-062 proves source trace shows plannedWorkHours and actualWorkHours values, entity id, field, and observedAt through UI/API readback.
E2E-061 and E2E-064 now cover both critical project-alpha-a source data and warning project-warning-a source data without Tenant B leakage.

e2e_evidence.notes: Deviation UI and API readback prove deterministic critical and warning control signals plus governed evaluation command audit.

evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts maps threshold rules by gt/gte/lt/lte/eq/between conditions and selects strongest matching severity deterministically
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves critical, warning, and none threshold outcomes with matched rule/action recommendations and trace
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves duplicate threshold rule ids are rejected to avoid ambiguous severity/readback semantics
E2E-061 proves threshold severity maps the seeded -25 value to critical.
E2E-062 proves matched threshold trace is visible through the Deviation Control surface.
E2E-063 proves a stricter -30 threshold changes a future evaluation to none while preserving historical critical trace.
E2E-061/E2E-062 prove warning threshold severity as well as critical severity through UI and API readback.

e2e_evidence.notes: Deviation UI and API readback prove deterministic critical and warning control signals plus governed evaluation command audit.

evidence: packages/kpi-engine/src/index.ts creates traceable KPI control signals from non-none evaluations without executing P8 actions and upserts matching open signals by definition/entity/period
packages/kpi-engine/src/kpiEngine.test.ts proves signal tenant/source/evaluation trace, recommended action keys, not_executed action state, and deduped update semantics
E2E-061 proves a deterministic KPI evaluation creates/upserts an open KPI control signal with recommended actions.
E2E-062 proves the deviation control signal traces to its source evaluation and recommended P8 handoff actions.
E2E-061 proves deterministic critical and warning KPI control signals with distinct recommendation keys.

rows.requirement: KPI API and governed configuration commands
evidence: apps/api/src/phase7Runtime.ts provides deterministic tenant-scoped KPI definitions, source values, evaluations, control signals, non-mutating definition preview, governed create/publish/retire commands, governed evaluation execution, and action execution readback.

apps/api/src/app.ts exposes P7 KPI API routes for definitions, preview/create/publish/retire, evaluation run/readback, deviations/readback, and audit while using backend permissions kpi:read, kpi.config:write, kpi.evaluate:execute, and audit.read.

apps/api/src/phase7KpiApi.test.ts proves deterministic read models, tenant isolation, dry-run preview without mutation, governed config commands with audit/action evidence, evaluation readback, deviation projection, read-only denial, cross-tenant denial without leaked ids, version conflicts, invalid formula rejection, and source-entity precondition rejection without partial mutation.
E2E-060 proves KPI definition create/publish API command readback and audit through the browser flow.
E2E-061 proves governed evaluation run API command creates refreshed signal/readback and audit evidence.
E2E-064 proves backend permission and tenant isolation denial for direct API mutation/read attempts.

evidence: apps/web/src/kpiDefinitionApiClient.ts exposes the P7 KPI Definition Admin API client for list, preview, create, publish, retire, and audit routes with typed DTOs and testUser tenant scoping.

apps/web/src/KpiDefinitionAdminSurface.tsx renders the Russian KPI definition management surface with TanStack Query reads/mutations, loading/empty/error/permission states, non-mutating formula preview, governed create/publish/retire commands, API readback refresh, and visible action/audit evidence.
apps/web/src/App.tsx wires the KPI navigation entry and KPI Definition Admin surface into the app shell when the P7 API client is available.

apps/web/src/KpiDefinitionAdminSurface.test.tsx proves definition load states, preview-before-mutation, create/publish readback, retire targeting the active KPI, read-only/no-read permission states, missing audit permission state, stale readback failure without local-only evidence, and conflict recovery.

Bug Hunt / requested code review findings were fixed: retire now targets active definitions, command evidence is only shown after successful readback, missing audit.read no longer looks like empty audit, and user-facing copy is Russian.
E2E-060 proves KPI Definition Admin preview/create/publish/readback/audit/reload/reset flow.
E2E-063 proves KPI Definition Admin exposes the critical threshold input and publishes the changed threshold configuration.
E2E-064 proves read-only UI cannot edit KPI definitions and backend denial is enforced.

evidence: apps/web/src/kpiDeviationApiClient.ts exposes typed P7 KPI deviation API methods for deviation list/detail, governed evaluation run, and audit readback.

apps/web/src/KpiDeviationControlSurface.tsx renders the Russian KPI Deviation Control management surface with severity signals, selected deviation detail, source trace, formula trace, threshold trace, version metadata, recommended P8 handoff actions, permission states, governed evaluation command, API readback refresh, and audit/action evidence.
apps/web/src/App.tsx wires KPI Deviation Control into the app shell and routes KPI navigation to the deviation surface when the definition-admin client is not available.

apps/web/src/KpiDeviationControlSurface.test.tsx proves load/empty/error states, detail traceability, governed evaluation refetch, audit evidence, readback failure without local-only evidence, missing audit permission denial, read-only state, and no KPI-read denial.

E2E-061 proves KPI Deviation Control renders a deterministic critical signal, can run governed evaluation, refreshes readback, and shows audit evidence.
E2E-062 proves KPI Deviation Control displays source/formula/threshold/version trace plus recommended management handoff and reload persistence.
